// Code generated by mvgen. DO NOT EDIT.
// Package utilities for {{ .NAME }}
{{- $SPEC := .SPEC }}
{{- $NS := .NS }}

/**
 * @fileoverview Generated package utilities for {{ .NAME }}
 */

import { {{ $NS }} } from './{{ .NAME }}.js';

/**
 * Package name constant
 */
export const PACKAGE_NAME = '{{ .NAME }}Package';

/**
 * Returns a new instance of the given component name
 * @param {string} compName - The component name
 * @returns {Object|null} A new instance or null if not found
 */
export function instanceOf(compName) {
  switch (compName) {
{{- range $recName, $rec := $SPEC.Records }}
    case '{{ $recName }}':
      return new {{ $NS }}.{{ $recName }}();
{{- end }}
{{- range $cmdName, $cmd := .CMDS }}
    case '{{ $cmdName }}':
      return new {{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}();
    case '{{ $cmdName }}Result':
      return new {{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}Result();
{{- end }}
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

/**
 * Returns the name of the given component instance
 * @param {Object} comp - The component instance
 * @returns {string} The component name or empty string
 */
export function nameOf(comp) {
  if (!comp || !comp.constructor) return '';
  return comp.constructor._typeName || comp.constructor.name;
}

/**
 * Verifies a message using the appropriate class verify method
 * @param {string} compName - The component name
 * @param {Object} message - The message to verify
 * @returns {string|null} `null` if valid, otherwise error message
 */
export function verify(compName, message) {
  switch (compName) {
{{- range $recName, $rec := $SPEC.Records }}
    case '{{ $recName }}':
      return {{ $NS }}.{{ $recName }}.verify(message);
{{- end }}
{{- range $cmdName, $cmd := .CMDS }}
    case '{{ $cmdName }}':
      return {{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}.verify(message);
    case '{{ $cmdName }}Result':
      return {{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}Result.verify(message);
{{- end }}
    default:
      return 'unknown component: ' + compName;
  }
}

/**
 * Creates a typed instance from a plain object
 * @param {string} compName - The component name
 * @param {Object} obj - The plain object
 * @returns {Object|null} The typed instance or null if not found
 */
export function fromObject(compName, obj) {
  switch (compName) {
{{- range $recName, $rec := $SPEC.Records }}
    case '{{ $recName }}':
      return {{ $NS }}.{{ $recName }}.fromObject(obj);
{{- end }}
{{- range $cmdName, $cmd := .CMDS }}
    case '{{ $cmdName }}':
      return {{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}.fromObject(obj);
    case '{{ $cmdName }}Result':
      return {{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}Result.fromObject(obj);
{{- end }}
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

/**
 * Command runner that dispatches commands to handlers
 */
export class CommandRunner {
  constructor() {
{{- range $cmdName, $cmd := .CMDS }}
    /** @type {function({{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}): Promise<{{ $NS }}.{{ $cmdName }}Result>|null} */
    this.run{{ $cmdName }} = null;
{{- end }}
  }

  /**
   * Run a command using the registered handler
   * @param {Object} cmd - The command to run
   * @returns {Promise<Object>} The command result
   * @throws {Error} If no handler registered or invalid command
   */
  async runCmd(cmd) {
    if (!cmd || !cmd.constructor) {
      throw new Error('Invalid command');
    }
    const cmdName = cmd.constructor._typeName || cmd.constructor.name;
    switch (cmdName) {
{{- range $cmdName, $cmd := .CMDS }}
      case '{{ $cmdName }}':
        if (!this.run{{ $cmdName }}) {
          throw new Error('No handler registered for {{ $cmdName }}');
        }
        return this.run{{ $cmdName }}(cmd);
{{- end }}
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unknown command: ${cmdName}`);
    }
  }
}

// Re-export the namespace
export { {{ $NS }} };
